name: [Weather] Replacement Scope

items.label: Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan

desc: Replace weather data only for matching regions.

name: [Weather] Data Source
desc: Use the selected provider to replace weather data.

name: [Weather] OpenWeather Fallback
desc: Fallback provider used when OpenWeather weather data is unavailable or rate-limited.

name: [Next-Hour Precipitation Intensity] Data Source
desc: Use the selected provider to replace or fill next-hour precipitation intensity data.

name: [Next-Hour Precipitation Intensity] OpenWeather Fallback
desc: Fallback provider used when OpenWeather next-hour precipitation data is unavailable or rate-limited.

name: [API] OpenWeather Request URL
desc: OpenWeather One Call API 4.0 request URL

name: [API] QWeather Host
desc: Hostname used by the QWeather API

name: [Storage] Configuration Type

items.label: Prefer configuration passed by $argument, such as plugin options and module arguments. Missing $argument values are provided by PersistentStore (BoxJs).
Only use configuration from $persistentStore, such as BoxJs.
Only use defaults from the author's database.mjs file. Other custom configuration will no longer take effect.

desc: Choose the configuration source. For legacy setups without this option, the order remains $persistentStore (BoxJs) > $argument > database.

name: [Debug] Log Level
desc: Choose the script log level. Logs below the selected level will be suppressed.
